entries.description: Registered Session 1 start via ai_router.start_session with orchestrator metadata (copilot / github / gpt-5.4).

Re-verified the structured-issue data path against current code and authored proposal.md under docs/proposals/2026-06-02-structured-verification-issue-artifacts/ with the recommended Session 1 dispositions.
Ran routed cross-provider design consensus on the Session 1 questions and saved the raw reviewer output to consensus-review.md. Verdict: CONSENSUS-AGREE with guardrails, no design reversals.

Wrote verdict.md as the authoritative Session 1 lock and updated spec.md with the S1 Audit Lock summary covering filenames, envelope shape, advisory resolution fields, clean-round behavior, helper scope, runtime scope, and release scope.
Authored ai-assignment.md via routed analysis for the Session 2 handoff. Recommendation: Claude / claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620 at low effort for the docs/schema/example implementation pass.

Ran formal end-of-session verification on the Session 1 bundle (spec.md, proposal.md, consensus-review.md, verdict.md). Verifier: gpt-5-4. Verdict: VERIFIED with no findings. Raw output saved to s1-verification.md.

Committed and pushed the Session 1 design-lock bundle, ran close_session with s1-close-reason.md on the API path, passed all five close-out gates, flipped Session 1 to complete with verificationVerdict=VERIFIED, and sent the session-complete notification successfully.
Started Session 2 via ai_router.start_session with orchestrator metadata (copilot / github / gpt-5.4). Session 2 is now in progress and ready for the implementation/docs pass.

Corrected the Session 2 orchestrator block in session-state.json from the copilot SessionStart-hook attribution (copilot / github / gpt-5.4) to the actual orchestrator that performed the implementation (claude / anthropic / claude-opus-4-8), per the omit-null 4-field contract (effort omitted as not authoritatively declarable).

Authored the locked structured-issue artifact: docs/session-issues.schema.json (JSON Schema for the envelope), docs/session-issues-schema-example.json (a concrete findings-bearing instance mixing an annotated and a bare issue), and docs/session-issues-schema.md (the orchestrator-facing reference mirroring disposition-schema.md). Added ai_router/tests/test_session_issues_schema.py (14 tests) validating the example against the schema and asserting the locked invariants. Per the S1 verdict, shipped NO helper (no real duplication: the package has no existing issue-artifact write path) and placed the schema/example under docs/ rather than the packaged ai_router/schemas/ (no runtime reader; keeps the set release-free).

Updated docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (artifact table row for sN-issues.json, retired-directory note, Step 6 persist-when-not-VERIFIED instruction, Step 7 ISSUES_FOUND structured-list persistence, cancel-history and artifacts-appear references) and docs/planning/session-set-authoring-guide.md (per-session artifact list + issue-logs retired). Committed only the Set 055 hunks of the workflow doc; the in-flight Set 056 engine-agnostic-doc-authority paragraph in the same file was left uncommitted for that independent set.
Ran the full Python suite via the workspace venv interpreter: 1074 passed, 1 skipped, exit 0. The +14 new tests come from test_session_issues_schema.py; no regressions.

Ran end-of-session cross-provider verification on the implementation bundle. Verifier: gemini-2.5-pro (Google) via direct providers.call_model. Verdict: VERIFIED with zero findings; all three flagged engineering decisions (no helper, docs/ placement, test-as-drift-guard) UPHELD. Raw output saved to s2-verification.md.

Authored change-log.md, disposition.json (VERIFIED, final session, no next_orchestrator), and s2-close-reason.md; committed and pushed the Set 055 implementation bundle; ran close_session on the API path to flip Session 2 and the set to complete with verificationVerdict=VERIFIED.
